scenes.text:
Debt does not buy you things. It
makes you a servant to the lender.

Consumer debt is designed to keep you working forever. That car payment. That credit card. That buy now pay later scheme. Every monthly payment is a chain that ties you
to a job you might not love. The interest alone means you are paying two, three, sometimes four times the original price. That is not smart. That is a trap.

Attack your debt like your freedom depends on it, because it does. Use the avalanche method. Pay
minimums on everything and throw every extra dollar at the highest interest debt. Repeat until free.

Debt-free is the new rich. Cut
the chains and build real wealth.

What is your debt freedom plan?
Share below. Follow for financial literacy.
